notes: Two-leg WTI/AUDUSD commodity-FX return-spread reversion basket from the approved EIA-RBA-WTI-AUD-2026 card. The EA runs from the XTIUSD.DWX host setfile and reads both D1 close series to compute log(XTI return) minus beta times log(AUDUSD return), standardized over a fixed lookback. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not the standalone legs.
